contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Implement subscription renewal sync to Stripe Checkout sheet + process Linda Ford July renewal sales
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/655
  
  Details:
  Implemented the plan from PR #655 end-to-end:
  
  **Code (agroverse_shop):**
  - Added invoice.paid webhook handler with subscription_cycle filter
  - Extended poller (syncStripeOrdersForEnvironment) to query /v1/invoices with 7-day lookback
  - 5 new helper functions: retrievePaidSubscriptionInvoices, retrieveStripeSubscription, saveSubscriptionPaymentToSheet, findOrderRowByColumn, ensureSubscriptionColumns_
  - New sheet columns R/S/T: Invoice ID, Payment Intent ID, Payment Type
  - Auto-creates headers on first poller run
  
  **Schema (tokenomics):**
  - Updated SCHEMA.md with columns R/S/T documentation and changelog
  
  **Deployment:**
  - Clasp push to GAS project 1ovx-Hq5L5MgzF32qB_cPV_G5Hc6XshKMAYOmiJY8tZ355gzWUqvFCPvn
  - Re-deployed web app after clasp deployment config reset
  - Cleaned up 3 broken deployments
  
  **Sales processing (dao_client):**
  - Backfilled Linda Ford July 12 subscription payment (invoice in_1TsT0kHrrz4344lsK6MU40Xf, $70.80)
  - Set owner email on 7 QR codes (2024OSCAR_CB_20260620_8-14)
  - Submitted 7 [SALES EVENT] to Edgar ($10.11/bar, $70.77 total)
  
  **Time split:** DeepSeek ~1.25h, Gary ~0.25h
  
  GitHub evidence:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/655
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta (main, 330+ lines)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
